title: Midnight Lockbox - Witness Saved, Truth Damaged Ending Card
prompt: Story: Midnight Lockbox (midnight-lockbox) | Hook: A self-storage unit with no renter sends voice memos predicting what your team will do next. | Subgenre: supernatural mystery | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels | Villain: The Quartermaster | Villain worldview: Storage is memory, and memory belongs to whoever controls access. | Motifs: unit tags, bolt cutters, time-lock stickers. Ending card for "Witness Saved, Truth Damaged" (PYRRHIC). Summary: You save the witness but lose admissible evidence in the rush.. Deliver emotional closure with sequel-hook tension.
negativePrompt: No logos, no unreadable text overlays, no cartoon style, no low-resolution blur, no gore excess, no meme aesthetics.
